data.title: Regnology Announces Next-Generation Ascend Platform with Agentic AI, Advancing the Future of Regulatory Reporting
data.description: A new development has been announced by Regnology in Frankfurt, Germany. The company has unveiled RSH Ascend as a significant achievement on the Ascend platform, emphasizing its agentic-first approach. This introduction aims to enhance supervisory visibility regarding Suspicious Transaction Reports (STR), marking a pivotal step forward.

data.title: Syngenta Group Reports 2025 Full Year Results
data.description: Today, Syngenta Group revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. Despite facing challenges, the company showcased strong operational resilience and an enhanced financial position. Throughout the year, Syngenta Group achieved notable results with increased margins and consistent cash flow. Sales for the full year of 2025 saw a 2% growth, excluding the influence of the company's deliberate decrease in lower-margin grain trading sales, which resulted in a $1 billion sales reduction.

data.title: Equinor ASA: Share buy-back – first tranche for 2026
data.description: Below are details regarding transactions completed as part of Equinor ASA's 2026 share buy-back program's first tranche. The program is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange (OSE:EQNR), New York Stock Exchange (NYSE:EQNR), CEUX (CEUX:EQNRO), and TQEX (TQEX:EQNRO).

data.title: ALSTOM S.A: Alstom signs a new systems contract in the AMECA region
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Alstom, a prominent company in smart and sustainable mobility, has revealed the signing of a fresh systems contract in the AMECA region. This agreement, secured as part of a consortium, holds a significant project worth reaching $2.75 billion. Alstom will contribute around 30% to this project, totaling approximately EUR 700 million.
Advancement made in buyback program with increasing shares. #sharebuyback #progress

data.title: TTEC Expands Cairo Operations with Major Hiring Initiative to Support Global Growth
data.description: Today, TTEC revealed a significant recruitment drive in Cairo, aiming to onboard over 330 new team members by April 2026.

data.title: Casino Group updates project to fortify financial structure; enhancing resilience and stability.
data.description: In recent news, it has been reported that the number of COVID-19 cases in City X has reached 10,000, with an increase of 500 cases in the last 24 hours. The death toll has also risen to 150, with 10 new deaths recorded. Health officials are urging residents to follow safety guidelines and take necessary precautions to prevent the spread of the virus. The city has implemented stricter measures to control the situation, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limitations on social gatherings. Officials are closely monitoring the situation and providing updates regularly.

data.title: ROHM Adds New Lineup of 17 High-performance Op Amps Enhancing Design Flexibility
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, on March 31, 2026, ROHM Co., Ltd. announced the introduction of the latest CMOS Operational Amplifier series, namely "TLRx728" and "BD728x." These op amps cater to various industries such as automotive, industrial, and consumer applications. The expanded series aims to meet the diverse needs of customers, with a wide range of functionalities provided for different sectors.

data.title: OpenBox AI Launches First Enterprise AI Trust Platform Built for Everyone, Backed by $5M Seed Round
data.description: With the introduction of the National AI Legislative Framework by the White House and the enforcement of the EU AI Act, OpenBox has responded by providing governance infrastructure that complies with regulatory standards. This offering is accessible to all organizations from the outset. The announcement was made in San Francisco on March 31, 2026, through a PRNewswire press release.

data.title: Sentinel Capital Partners to Sell Spectrum Safety Solutions' Marioff Division
data.description: Major private equity firm Sentinel Capital Partners disclosed today that they have finalized a deal to divest a renowned global company specializing in high-pressure water mist fire protection systems. The divestiture marks a significant move in the market, highlighting Sentinel Capital Partners' strategic investment approach in midmarket enterprises. This transaction, signed on March 31, 2026, highlights the growing interest in the fire protection systems sector and underlines the potential of high-pressure water mist technologies.

data.title: Bitmine grabs $147M worth of ETH, purchasing 71,000 Ether in its largest buying week of the year, totaling 238,244 Ether in five weeks.
data.description: Bitmine has purchased more than 71,000 Ether in the last week, in addition to the 238,244 Ether it bought in the preceding four weeks.

data.title: US rule aims to make $8 trillion retirement market accessible to cryptocurrency through safe harbor proposal for 401(k) managers.
data.description: Under the proposed safe harbor rule, managers of 401(k) plans could potentially provide crypto-related funds to investors while benefiting from increased legal safeguards. This would give investors added security when considering these types of investments within their retirement accounts.
